mte_summary: BPMS015 validation enhancements for subcontracted requisitions

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition using a subcontracted item. Ensure pegging information is missing. Submit the requisition for approval. Verify that the BPMS015 case is rejected and an email notification stating rejection due to missing Peg/GI info is received.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected during workflow execution with email notification sent.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition using a subcontracted item (e.g., ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL)
Verify that pegging and GI information fields are blank or missing for the requisition line
Submit purchase requisition for approval to trigger BPMS015 workflow
Monitor system validation during BPMS015 processing step
Verify that BPMS015 case status is set to Rejected with appropriate error code
steps.expected_result: BPMS015 case rejected due to missing Peg/GI info

steps.action: Verify that email notification regarding rejection is received by requester
steps.expected_result: Email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to PEG/GI info missing is received

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Requisition: Blank BP or Employee Supplier

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition using a subcontracted item with blank Business Partner (BP) field. Submit the requisition for approval. Complete the initial Buyer Review to simulate manual processing step. Verify that the BPMS015 case is rejected after buyer review and an email notification stating rejection due to blank supplier is received.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification after buyer review due to blank BP/Employee supplier.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition using a subcontracted item
Ensure Business Partner (BP) field is left blank for the supplier line
Submit purchase requisition for approval to trigger BPMS015 workflow
Complete Buyer Review task to allow system to proceed to next validation stage
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case proceeds to auto-validation check

steps.action: Verify that BPMS015 case is rejected due to blank BP or Employee supplier field
steps.expected_result: BPMS015 case rejected after buyer review

steps.action: Verify that email notification regarding rejection is received by requester
steps.expected_result: Email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to blank BP or Employee supplier is received

test_cases.summary: SubConDefault Item Rejection - Missing Production Order Link

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition using a SubConDefault item that is not linked to an active production order. Submit the requisition for approval. Verify that the BPMS015 case is rejected with email notification stating rejection due to missing production order linkage.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification due to SubConDefault item not being linked to a production order.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition using a SubConDefault item (e.g., ZZSCDFT-TEST001)
Ensure that no corresponding active production order exists for this SubConDefault item
steps.expected_result: No active production order linked to item

steps.action: Submit purchase requisition for approval to trigger BPMS015 workflow
Complete Buyer Review task to simulate manual processing step
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case proceeds to validation check

steps.action: Verify that BPMS015 case is rejected due to SubConDefault item not being linked to production order
steps.expected_result: BPMS015 case rejected due to missing PO linkage

steps.action: Verify that email notification regarding rejection is received by requester
steps.expected_result: Email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to SubConDefault item not linked to production order

test_cases.summary: Multi-line Requisition Rejection - Subcontracted Items Only

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition with multiple lines where all lines are for subcontracted items. Submit the requisition for approval. Verify that the BPMS015 case is rejected with email notification stating rejection due to multi-line subcontracted requisition.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification due to multi-line subcontracted items.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with two or more lines
Ensure that all lines contain subcontracted items (e.g., ZZZSPL-SUBCON-* pattern)
steps.expected_result: All lines confirmed as subcontracted items

steps.action: Submit purchase requisition for approval to trigger BPMS015 workflow
Complete Buyer Review task to simulate manual processing step
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. Case proceeds to validation check

steps.action: Verify that BPMS015 case is rejected due to multi-line subcontracted items being present
steps.expected_result: BPMS015 case rejected due to multiple subcontracted lines

steps.action: Verify that email notification regarding rejection is received by requester
steps.expected_result: Email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to multiple subcontracted lines is received

test_cases.summary: Standard Subcontracted Requisition - Happy Path Conversion

description.scenario: Create a production order with a valid subcontracting task. Generate subcontracting documents to create a single-line PRQ for a subcontracted item. Submit PRQ for approval through BPMS015 and complete Buyer Review. Release production order and run BWQ to accept requisition. Verify that PRQ is converted into a 137 PO series purchase order. Submit PO for approval, complete DOA and supplier response, and verify PO is approved.
description.expected_result: Subcontracted purchase requisition successfully processed with all validations passing, resulting in an approved 137 series purchase order.

steps.action: Create a production order and add subcontracting task (e.g., '341ARW1') under Planning Line tab
steps.expected_result: Production order created with subcontracting task

steps.action: Go to Actions > Subcontracting > Generate Subcontracting Documents and locate PRQ in document list
steps.expected_result: Subcontracting documents generated with PRQ listed

steps.action: Ensure pegging information is complete and BP field is populated for the subcontracted item
steps.expected_result: Pegging and BP information confirmed valid

steps.action: Submit purchase requisition for approval to trigger BPMS015 workflow
Complete Buyer Review task and verify that BPMS015 case completes without rejection
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. BPMS015 case completed successfully

steps.action: Release production order and run BWQ to accept the requisition
steps.expected_result: Production order released. PRQ accepted via BWQ

steps.action: Verify that PRQ is in Converted status and a 137 series PO is generated
Open purchase order from Linked Requisition Line Data and submit PO for approval
Complete DOA processing and supplier response for the PO approval
Verify that the purchase order status is Approved

description.scenario: Create a standard purchase requisition with a single line for a non-subcontracted item. Submit the requisition for approval through BPMS015 and complete Buyer Review. Release production order (if applicable) or run BWQ to accept requisition directly. Verify that PRQ is converted into a 137 series PO. Submit PO for approval, complete DOA and supplier response, and verify PO is approved.
description.expected_result: Standard purchase requisition successfully processed with all validations passing, resulting in an approved 137 series purchase order.

steps.action: Create a standard purchase requisition with a single line for non-subcontracted item (e.g., ZZZCST)
Ensure pegging information is complete and BP field is populated
steps.expected_result: Pegging and BP information confirmed valid

steps.action: Submit purchase requisition for approval to trigger BPMS015 workflow
Complete Buyer Review task and verify that BPMS015 case completes without rejection
steps.expected_result: Buyer Review completed. BPMS015 case completed successfully

steps.action: Run BWQ to accept the requisition and convert it into a purchase order
steps.expected_result: PRQ accepted via BWQ. Conversion triggered

steps.action: Verify that PRQ is in Converted status and a 137 series PO is generated
Open purchase order from Linked Requisition Line Data and submit PO for approval
Complete DOA processing and supplier response for the PO approval
Verify that the purchase order status is Approved
